name: GodMode Server
postCreateCommand: git clone https://github.com/johnjuuljensen/GodMode.git /tmp/godmode-src && sudo dotnet publish /tmp/godmode-src/src/GodMode.Server -c Release -o /opt/godmode-server && sudo rm -rf /tmp/godmode-src && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Code
